name: OpenHip Twist
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Basic Movements: Open, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Hockey Stick, Open Hip Twist, Progressive Walks Forward, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R)
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Fencing, Three Alemanas, Basic Movements: Open, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Three Threes, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn to R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn to L, Reverse Top
notes: Dynamic variations include settling on the hip, rotating the hip, and pulling tension. The lady stretches and delays weight transfer, holds on beat 3, and turns 1/2 to the left before completing the turn. Body action remains active throughout, with emphasis on hip movement and arm extension.

steps.action: Close LF to RF slightly back
comments: Brace L arm towards end of preceding beat, then L arm to L side

steps.action: Step to side in Fan Position

comments: Delay weight transfer, hold 3, weight transfer on &
Settle R side, center back, compress, R elbow out, keep volume

steps.action: Back in Fan Position, complete turn
comments: Turn initiates from hips, walk into own arm, tighten thighs, collect center
Turn 1/2 to left into partner's hand, then back in Fan Position
